login.title: Sign in
login.unknown_error: Something went wrong. Try again in a moment.

password.title: Change password
password.force_message: Your current password was auto-generated. Please choose a new one before continuing.
password.hint: At least 12 characters. Choose something you haven't used elsewhere.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.placeholder_hint: Browse Cloudflare, Tunnels and Hosts in the sidebar.

cloudflare.title: Cloudflare accounts
cloudflare.hint: Add your Cloudflare API token to let CloudGate create tunnels and DNS records on your behalf.
cloudflare.add_hint: Paste an API token with the scopes Tunnels:Edit, DNS:Edit and Zone:Read.
cloudflare.empty: No Cloudflare accounts yet. Add one to get started.
cloudflare.confirm_delete: Delete {{label}}? This removes the account and all cached zones.
cloudflare.no_zones: No zones cached. Click refresh to fetch them.

tunnels.title: Cloudflare tunnels
tunnels.empty: No tunnels yet. Create one to expose services.
tunnels.name_hint: Letters, numbers, dashes and underscores only.
tunnels.confirm_delete: Delete tunnel {{name}}? It will also be removed from Cloudflare.

hosts.title: Hosts
hosts.empty: No hosts yet. Add one to expose a local service.
hosts.no_tls_verify_hint: Tick this if your local service uses a self-signed cert.
hosts.no_cf_warning: Add a Cloudflare account first before creating hosts.
hosts.no_tunnel_warning: Create a tunnel first under Tunnels.
hosts.invalid_hostname: Enter a valid domain name (e.g. immich.example.com).
hosts.confirm_delete: Delete host {{hostname}}? DNS record will also be removed.
hosts.errors_present_body: Hover the red status badge for details. Often a missing token scope:
